items.title: A study estimates the iPhone's diffusion explains 33%-52% of the decline in US births from 2007 to 2011, with the most pronounced effects among women aged 15-24 (Sabrina Tavernise/New York Times)
items.title_original: A study estimates the iPhone's diffusion explains 33%-52% of the decline in US births from 2007 to 2011, with the most pronounced effects among women aged 15-24 (Sabrina Tavernise/New York Times)
items.title_en: A study estimates the iPhone's diffusion explains 33%-52% of the decline in US births from 2007 to 2011, with the most pronounced effects among women aged 15-24 (Sabrina Tavernise/New York Times)
items.title_zh: 一项研究估计，iPhone 的普及是 2007 年至 2011 年美国出生率下降 33%-52% 的原因，其中 15-24 岁女性的影响最为明显（Sabrina Tavernise/纽约时报）
items.title_bilingual: 一项研究估计，iPhone 的普及是 2007 年至 2011 年美国出生率下降 33%-52% 的原因，其中 15-24 岁女性的影响最为明显（Sabrina Tavernise/纽约时报） / A study estimates the iPhone's diffusion explains 33%-52% of the decline in US births from 2007 to 2011, with the most pronounced effects among women aged 15-24 (Sabrina Tavernise/New York Times)

iOS 27 又把磨砂效果加回来了，而且你能把磨砂效果调到满。跟之前的没啥区别，
液态玻璃效果完全没了。

侧边栏从卡片又改回了原来的那个填满的效果

items.title: In a notice to Maine's AG, Meta says ~20K Instagram accounts may have been hacked during the months-long abuse of its Meta AI chatbot, starting April 17 (Zack Whittaker/~this week in security~)

items.title_en: In a notice to Maine's AG, Meta says ~20K Instagram accounts may have been hacked during the months-long abuse of its Meta AI chatbot, starting April 17 (Zack Whittaker/~this week in security~)
items.title_zh: Meta 在给缅因州 AG 的一份通知中表示，从 4 月 17 日开始，在其 Meta AI 聊天机器人长达数月的滥用过程中，大约 2 万个 Instagram 账户可能遭到黑客攻击（Zack Whittaker/~本周安全报道~）
items.title_bilingual: Meta 在给缅因州 AG 的一份通知中表示，从 4 月 17 日开始，在其 Meta AI 聊天机器人长达数月的滥用过程中，大约 2 万个 Instagram 账户可能遭到黑客攻击（Zack Whittaker/~本周安全报道~） / In a notice to Maine's AG, Meta says ~20K Instagram accounts may have been hacked during the months-long abuse of its Meta AI chatbot, starting April 17 (Zack Whittaker/~this week in security~)

items.title_bilingual: 注意：Meta 表示，在最近的一次攻击中，约有 20,000 个 Instagram 帐户可能遭到黑客攻击，该攻击滥用了人工智能驱动的帐户恢复支持工具来重置密码（Eduard Kovacs/SecurityWeek） / Notice: Meta says ~20,000 Instagram accounts may have been hacked in a recent attack that abused an AI-powered account recovery support tool to reset passwords (Eduard Kovacs/SecurityWeek)

items.title:
这个说的的挺对的

我最近的一个和很强烈的感受也是

人机协作才是未来

之前我一直追求完全的自动化导致了不停的和AI扯皮或者总觉得对系统、技能不满意一直在修改它...

结果是你越想优化它它就崩溃，...
